calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The matter comes on calendar this date, having been assigned by Department 206 for Uncontested Trial and Stipulation of the parties.
Judge David L. Ballati, Clerk Nancy Regas, Court Reporter Susan Lee, CSR #4280, Dept. 604.
The parties stipulate to an unlawful detainer judgment. Plaintiff is entitled to possession of the premises at 261 Loomis Street, San Francisco. Lease is forfeited. Writ of Possession may issue immediately. Eviction to be scheduled after November 27, 2006. Plaintiff is awarded a money judgment in the amount of $11, 545 for rents, damages, attorneys fees and costs. If Defendant moves all of his personal property from the premises and returns the keys by the close of business on November 27, 2006, Plaintiff will move to set aside the judgment within 5 days thereafter. Defendant relieves Plaintiff of all claims and Plaintiff waives claims for hold over rent.
Parties agree to the terms of the agreement in open court.
